articles.title: Islamic State militants kill at least 29 in an attack on a village in northeastern Nigeria
articles.excerpt: Officials say militants with the Islamic State group attacked a village overnight in northeastern Nigeria, killing at least 29 people
articles.content: ABUJA, Nigeria -- Militants with the Islamic State group attacked a village overnight in northeastern Nigeria, killing at least 29 people, authorities said Monday. It was the latest violence in Afric…
